title: screen-find-text
description: OCR text-search result emitted by `testanyware screen find-text --json`. Captures the guest framebuffer host-side, runs OCR (Apple Vision on macOS, native Windows.Media.Ocr on Windows, the EasyOCR daemon on Linux), and reports detections whose text contains the query (case-insensitive substring). With no query, every detection is returned, capped at `limit` (default 100) unless `--all`. Detection coordinates are in framebuffer pixels, the same space as `screen capture`.

query.description: The search string, or null in no-query dump mode.

engine.description: OCR engine that produced the detections.

returned.description: Number of detections in `detections` (after any limit).

total.description: Total matches before the limit was applied.

truncated.description: True when `total` exceeded the limit and `detections` was capped.
